name: t4l_benzene_full_cycle

literature.reference: Mobley DL, Chodera JD, Dill KA. JCTC 2007, 3, 1231-1235

interpretation: Cycle closes. ΔG_bind = -4.006 ± 0.183 kcal/mol vs literature -5.18 ± 0.18. |Δ| = 1.17 kcal/mol (passes ±2 kcal/mol criterion). The 1.17 kcal/mol deviation from the literature ITC value is consistent with the slightly loose flat-bottom 8 Å restraint vs the tighter Boresch 6-DOF used in Mobley 2007. Total wall-time: 8.89 h on 1 × NVIDIA RTX 5090.
